heroSubtitle: Partner with our board-certified specialists for comprehensive critical care, pulmonary, sleep, and interventional services.
aboutBody1: Critical Care, Pulmonary and Sleep Associates has been proudly serving the Denver metro area for over 40 years. As an independent, physician-owned practice, we provide specialized critical care, pulmonary, sleep, and interventional pulmonary services to multiple CommonSpirit and AdventHealth hospitals and outpatient clinics.
aboutBody2: Our team of over 30 board-certified physicians works collaboratively with referring physicians and hospital partners to deliver exceptional patient care and outcomes.

services.title: Critical Care Services
services.description: Comprehensive ICU coverage and consultation for critically ill patients across multiple hospital sites.

services.title: Pulmonary Medicine
services.description: Board-certified pulmonologists providing outpatient pulmonary services and hospital consultations.

services.title: Interventional Pulmonology
services.description: Advanced procedures including bronchoscopy, transbronchial biopsies, and airway management.

services.title: Sleep Medicine
services.description: Comprehensive sleep disorder diagnosis and treatment in our accredited sleep labs.

services.title: Neurocritical Care
services.description: Specialized care for neurologically ill and injured patients in our ICUs.

referralSections.title: How to Refer a Patient
items: Use our online patient portal for direct consultation requests
Patients can self-schedule via our online system

referralSections.title: What We Need
items: Clinical question or reason for consultation

excellenceBody: We're committed to providing evidence-based, collaborative care and maintaining the highest standards of clinical practice.

excellenceItems.title: Board Certified
excellenceItems.description: All physicians are board-certified in their specialties

excellenceItems.title: Multidisciplinary Care
excellenceItems.description: Collaborative approach with hospital teams and specialists

excellenceItems.title: Continuous Improvement
excellenceItems.description: Ongoing education and adoption of best practices

ctaBody: Contact us today to refer a patient or discuss a case with one of our specialists.
